title: LA SFR — Type V-B single-family, complete code analysis
notes: Clean baseline. Code-analysis sheet has all required fields; no overlay zones flagged.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 1234 MAPLE ST, LOS ANGELES CA 90026
CODE ANALYSIS SHEET A-0.1
2023 LA BUILDING CODE (LABC) - based on 2022 CBC with LA amendments
Occupancy Group: R-3 (single-family dwelling)
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 2
Building height: 24 ft
Total building area: 2,800 sf
Per-story area: 1,400 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes (NFPA 13D residential)
Design occupant load: 10
IECC compliance path: Title 24 Part 6 prescriptive
Electrical service: 200 A service main breaker
Water closets: WC 3
Lavatories: LAV 3
EXIT 1 (front door)
EXIT 2 (rear door)
EXIT DOOR 36" min clear width
Fire alarm: NFPA 72 smoke alarms per CRC R314
No commercial kitchen. No atrium. No elevator.
